scripts.install:all: concurrently "cd frontend && npm install" "cd backend && npm install"
scripts.build: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run build" "cd backend && npm run build"
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && SET NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider && npm start" "cd backend && npm run dev"
scripts.test: concurrently "cd frontend && npm test" "cd backend && npm test"
